item.title: Wisconsin Bolsters Resume With Overtime Win at No. 8 Illinois
item.description: Wisconsin beats No. 8 Illinois in overtime in Champaign to earn another significant road victory.

item.title: MLB Free Agency Rumors, Buzz: Tampa Bay Rays Sign Pitcher Nick Martinez
item.description: Keeping track of players who may be on the move, manager comings and goings, and other buzz from around the majors.

item.title: 4 Takeaways From Purdue's Thrilling OT Win Over Nebraska
item.description: FOX Sports' Michael Cohen offers four takeaways from Purdue's thrilling overtime win over Nebraska.

item.title: Buzz Williams 'Completely Aware' Of Maryland's Disappointing Season
item.description: Head coach Buzz Williams understands just how poorly Maryland's season has gone.

item.title: New Raiders Head Coach Klint Kubiak Addresses Maxx Crosby's Future In Las Vegas
item.description: The Raiders introduced Klint Kubiak as their new head coach on Tuesday.
